name: Iñigo Zabaleta-Mendizabal
summary: Strategic Cloud Architect with over 15 years of experience designing scalable, high-availability distributed systems. Proven track record in leading digital transformation initiatives and optimizing multi-cloud environments for global enterprises.

experience.title: Principal Cloud Architect
experience.description: Lead the architectural strategy for enterprise-wide cloud migration, overseeing a portfolio of 50+ microservices and reducing infrastructure costs by 30% through serverless adoption.

experience.title: Senior Cloud Engineer
experience.description: Designed and implemented robust CI/CD pipelines and automated infrastructure provisioning using Terraform, supporting a team of 40 developers.

experience.title: Systems Administrator
experience.description: Managed on-premise data centers and transitioned legacy monolithic applications to early cloud-based virtualized environments.

education.degree: Master of Science in Computer Engineering
